# Dia Browser Release Notes

## April 2026

**v1.25.0** (April 2, 2026)
- Downloads with Visual Guidance: file downloads animate toward sidebar for clear placement feedback
- Custom Tab Icons: replace any tab's favicon with an emoji for personalized navigation
- Split-Screen Multitasking: drag any tab to screen edge for instant side-by-side view
- Meeting Countdown Animations: smooth transition animations on meeting countdowns
- Tab Group Naming Animation: rainbow shimmer effect when Dia auto-names tab groups
- Spotify Integration Visual: animated musical notes around Spotify tab favicon; hover reveals current track
- Navigation Button Feedback: fluid response animations on navigation buttons

## March 2026

**v1.24.0** (March 26, 2026)
- Fixed memory leaks causing performance degradation over time
- Optimized new tab page animations to reduce CPU/GPU usage
- Accelerated command bar suggestion rendering with pre-warmed favicon/database caches
- Improved system load handling by skipping unnecessary processing steps
- Added Early Birds Program for early feature access and direct feedback
- Built-in performance issue recording tool (Help > Record a Performance Issue)

**v1.23.0** (March 19, 2026)
- Features focused on review and merge workflows

**v1.22.0** (March 11, 2026)
- "Don't think about the next step. Take it"

**v1.21.0** (March 5, 2026)
- "Before you reach for it..."

## Last Fetched
2026-04-05
